income_thresholds.description: Annual household income must be below Rs 2.5 lakh as per SECC 2011 deprivation criteria. Bihar implements the standard PM-JAY eligibility criteria through SECC 2011.

exclusion_rules.description: This is Bihar's PM-JAY implementation. Enrollment and card generation are through Bihar SHA. Treatment available across India.
Families where any member has employer-provided health insurance are excluded
Government employees and their families are excluded
Any family member paying income tax disqualifies the entire household
Families owning motorized two-wheeler, three-wheeler, or four-wheeler are excluded
Families owning mechanized agricultural equipment are excluded
Families owning more than 2.5 acres of irrigated land with irrigation equipment are excluded

family_criteria.family_definition: Family as defined in SECC 2011 database for Bihar. All members listed in the SECC family unit are covered. Coverage is floater across all family members. No cap on family size.

covered_procedures: Diagnostics and lab tests during hospitalization

required_documents.name: Aadhaar Card
required_documents.notes: Required for e-KYC verification at empanelled hospital or CSC

required_documents.name: Ration Card (NFSA)
required_documents.notes: NFSA ration card holders are auto-included. If not available, SECC inclusion letter is checked.

required_documents.name: SECC 2011 Inclusion Letter
required_documents.notes: Letter confirming family is listed in SECC 2011 deprivation database under D1-D7 categories in Bihar

required_documents.name: Mobile Number
required_documents.notes: Linked to Aadhaar for OTP-based verification. Family member's number acceptable.

required_documents.name: Family Photo
required_documents.notes: Required for new Ayushman card generation at CSC or hospital

enrollment_channels: Common Service Centre (CSC / Jan Seva Kendra)
enrollment_steps: Step 1: Check eligibility on pmjay.gov.in or call 14555 with Aadhaar number or ration card number
Step 2: Visit nearest CSC (Jan Seva Kendra) or empanelled hospital in Bihar with Aadhaar card and ration card
Step 3: Complete e-KYC verification (Aadhaar biometric or OTP)
Step 4: Operator verifies SECC 2011 inclusion status in the BIS portal for Bihar
Step 5: Family photograph taken and uploaded to the system
Step 6: Ayushman card (Golden Card) generated and printed on the spot
Step 7: Card is valid immediately; present at any empanelled hospital in Bihar or across India for cashless treatment
description_for_embedding: Bihar's implementation of Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY, the central government health insurance scheme. Provides Rs 5 lakh per family per year for hospitalization to SECC 2011 families in Bihar. Bihar is one of the largest beneficiary states of PM-JAY given its high proportion of economically vulnerable families. Standard PM-JAY eligibility through SECC deprivation criteria applies. Covers 1,393 medical packages across 26 specialties at empanelled hospitals. Golden Card valid across India. Enrollment via CSC, empanelled hospitals, or pmjay.gov.in. Helpline 14555. Bihar SHA manages state-level implementation.
